name: The Yard 901
about: The Yard 901 is a state-of-the-art indoor athletic training facility located in Arlington, TN. It offers a comprehensive 10,000 sq/ft gym, group exercise classes, and sport-specific training programs. The venue features a dedicated golf simulator suite, putting green, turf field, and batting cages, catering to a wide range of athletic activities and training needs. It operates as a membership-based fitness club with a focus on providing premium equipment and facilities for athletes and fitness enthusiasts of all ages and skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Dedicated golf simulator suite for year-round play
Part of a larger athletic facility with multiple amenities
Premium equipment and technology for a quality experience

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned, BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Hardware not specified, though linked to golftheyard.com

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental policies, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, and no explicit BYOB policy is stated.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific information on the duration of an 18-hole simulator session.

faq.question: Is The Yard 901 kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Yard 901 explicitly mentions free childcare and offers youth sports and group fitness programs, making it a family-friendly facility.
